arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim press conference LIVE Manchester United injury updates ahead of Europa League clash
arts.sum: Live updates from Ruben Amorim's pre-match press conference as Man United prepare to face Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe comes under fire from Man Utd fans again after 'offensive' decision
arts.sum: Manchester United have binned their discounted tickets for the remainder of the season and club members will now be required to pay £66 with no concessions prices available at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: 'Berated him': Ruben Amorim spotted being furious at £37m Man United player in last minute vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim hasn’t had the dream start as the new manager of Manchester United. Indeed, a 1-1 draw against Ipswich Town was not the start...

arts.ttl: 16 y/o Man Utd Sensation On Track to Make Premier League History
arts.sum: 16-year-old Man Utd sensation Godwill Kukonki is on track to make Premier League history according to club insiders.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Ruben Amorim makes firm transfer decision on struggling Manchester United duo
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has made it clear that he doesn’t want Marcus Rashford or Rasmus Hojlund to leave the club in upcoming transfer windows. arts.ttl: Man Utd chief sets massive target for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Man Utd's CEO reveals the primary aim for Ruben Amorim as the club's new head coach.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Man Utd shake-up becomes clearer as Erik ten Hag's trusted coach squeezed out
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has made a clear break from Erik ten Hag's regime by demoting the Dutchman's former lieutenants, with the new Manchester United boss trusting the advisors he has brought with him

arts.ttl: “I was very sad that he left” – Assistant manager on Manchester United’s transfer mistake
arts.sum: David de Gea spent 12 years at Manchester United before leaving them as a free agent at the end of the 2022/23 season. arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid on Ruben Amorim's radar 'to sign professional contract on Friday'
arts.sum: Wonderkid Chido Obi Martin will allegedly sign a professional contract with Manchester United when he turns 17 on Friday.

arts.ttl: New documentary covering the life and career of Sir Alex Ferguson set for release on Boxing Day - with an accompanying podcast series due to feature one of his most famous footballing rivals
arts.sum: More than a decade after the legendary Scotsman called time on his career in the dugout, interest in what allowed him to enjoy such unprecedented success remains as high as ever.
